rows.source_ref: joy22, "The Red Sniper", BabyPips forum thread (2011), https://forums.babypips.com/t/the-red-sniper/39031
rows.strategy_name: Red Sniper HMA/LSMA + Direction arrow trend follow
rows.concept: Trend-following on H4/Daily entering on a proprietary 'Direction' arrow signal confirmed by matching HMA34 and LSMA(34) color, exiting on arrow reversal.
rows.eligibility_reason: Core entry trigger is an undisclosed proprietary 'Direction' arrow indicator (hidden template internals; users report it crashed their MT4); cannot be reproduced faithfully, and the definable remainder is a generic dual-MA color trend-follower with no structural edge.
rows.notes: Also names D1 timeframe. HMA34 and LSMA(34) color are implementable in pure MQL5 but are only confirmations; the 'Direction' arrow that fires entries is opaque. Marketing tone ('Simple and Effective', poster claims 3/3 winners, fixed 40-pip SL/40-pip TP variant). Thread only 7 posts, mostly reports of platform crashes on load; no edge evidence.
